description: HUDEP-2 WT Capture Hi-C contact frequencies at Q2b variant positions

q2b_analysis.note: All 21 Q2b variants fall in a single 5kb bin (HBB gene body)

long_range_enrichment.interpretation: Q2b bin shows significant long-range contact enrichment (1.76x background)

interpretation: Q2b bin (HBB gene) shows statistically significant enrichment of long-range contacts (p=0.0016, 1.76x background), consistent with ARCHCODE prediction that Q2b variants disrupt structurally important chromatin regions. However, specific Q2b-to-LCR contacts are at distance-expected levels (ratio 1.05), suggesting the enrichment is distributed across multiple regulatory partners, not exclusively LCR.
limitations: 5kb resolution too coarse for single-variant analysis (all Q2b in one bin)
WT-only (no mutant Hi-C to show contact loss at Q2b)
hg19 assembly — coordinate liftover introduces ~100bp uncertainty
